testcase.name: test_help

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 1 == 0 + where 1 = CompletedProcess(args=['python3', './qface/app.py', '--help'], returncode=1, stdout=b'').returncode

testcase.failure:
def test_help(): result = subprocess.run(['python3', './qface/app.py', "--help"], stdout=subprocess.PIPE, env=env) > assert result.returncode == 0 E AssertionError: assert 1 == 0 E + where 1 = CompletedProcess(args=['python3', './qface/app.py', '--help'], returncode=1, stdout=b'').returncode

testcase.name: test_generate

testcase.failure:
def test_generate(): tmpDir = tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() result = subprocess.run(['python3', './qface/app.py', "--rules", "tests/app_templates/rules.yaml", "--target", tmpDir.name, "--force", "tests/in/com.pelagicore.ivi.tuner.qface"], stdout=subprocess.PIPE, env=env) > assert result.returncode == 0 E AssertionError: assert 1 == 0 E + where 1 = CompletedProcess(args=['python3', './qface/app.py', '--rules', 'tests/app_templates/rules.yaml', '--target', '/var/fol...73l4tyy9v0_96rgh0000gn/T/tmpepezw21p', '--force', 'tests/in/com.pelagicore.ivi.tuner.qface'], returncode=1, stdout=b'').returncode

testcase.name: test_generate_and_run

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 1 == 0 + where 1 = CompletedProcess(args=['python3', './qface/app.py', '--rules', 'tests/app_templates/rules.yaml', '--target', '/var/fol.../T/tmp1bu7urp4', '--force', 'tests/in/com.pelagicore.ivi.tuner.qface', '--run', 'echo DONE'], returncode=1, stdout=b'').returncode

testcase.failure:
def test_generate_and_run(): tmpDir = tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() result = subprocess.run(['python3', './qface/app.py', "--rules", "tests/app_templates/rules.yaml", "--target", tmpDir.name, "--force", "tests/in/com.pelagicore.ivi.tuner.qface", "--run", "echo DONE"], stdout=subprocess.PIPE, env=env) > assert result.returncode == 0 E AssertionError: assert 1 == 0 E + where 1 = CompletedProcess(args=['python3', './qface/app.py', '--rules', 'tests/app_templates/rules.yaml', '--target', '/var/fol.../T/tmp1bu7urp4', '--force', 'tests/in/com.pelagicore.ivi.tuner.qface', '--run', 'echo DONE'], returncode=1, stdout=b'').returncode
